category_sources: source_facts.description: Server-side proxy that adds dnscrypt support to name resolvers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives dnscrypt-wrapper; source_facts.homepage is the matching official project page.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project page; official GitHub README is the source documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/cofyc/dnscrypt-wrapper; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a server-side DNSCrypt proxy for name resolvers; source_facts.executables lists dnscrypt-wrapper.
